summary: Large assembly-labeling PR that moved a previously ambiguous Dolphin audio block out of asm/dolphin/ax/ax_unk.s into named asm/dolphin/axfx files, labeled AXFX chorus/delay/reverb routines, and applied GameCube debug-ELF-derived MCC/FIO/HIO and related baselib symbol names. The PR mattered because it replaced thousands of func_/lbl_ placeholders and an explicitly uncertain ax_unk grouping with library-recognizable modules and entry points, improving future decompilation targeting and callgraph readability.
what_changed: Deleted asm/dolphin/ax/ax_unk.s, which previously contained 3381 lines and a comment warning that the block was likely not part of AX and that ReverbHICreate might not be correct.
Added separate AXFX assembly files for axfx.s, chorus.s, delay.s, reverb_hi.s, and reverb_std.s, then updated obj_files.mk to replace asm/dolphin/ax/ax_unk.s.o with the new AXFX object list.
Introduced AXFX allocator hook symbols and defaults: AXFXAllocFunction, AXFXFreeFunction, AXFXSetHooks, __AXFXAlloc, and __AXFXFree.

Labeled AXFX effect functions including AXFXChorusInit, AXFXChorusShutdown, AXFXChorusSettings, AXFXChorusCallback, AXFXDelayInit, AXFXDelaySettings, AXFXDelayShutdown, AXFXDelayCallback, AXFXReverbHiInit, AXFXReverbHiShutdown, AXFXReverbHiCallback, AXFXReverbStdInit, AXFXReverbStdShutdown, and AXFXReverbStdCallback.
Kept lower-level/internal AXFX labels where available, including ReverbHICreate, ReverbHIFree, ReverbSTDCreate, ReverbSTDFree, DoCrossTalk, HandleReverb, do_src1, do_src2, rsmpTab12khz, and lens.

Relabeled MCC and FIO routines in asm/dolphin/mcc/mcc.s and asm/dolphin/mcc/fio.s, replacing many func_8032xxxx callsites with meaningful MCC/FIO names such as MCCInit, MCCOpen, MCCClose, MCCNotify, MCCRead, MCCWrite, MCCSetChannelEventMask, MCCGetConnectionStatus, MCCStreamOpen, MCCStreamClose, MCCStreamWrite, FIOInit, FIOExit, FIOQuery, FIOFopen, FIOFclose, and FIOFwrite.

Labeled FIO packet helpers and globals, including fioPacketMakeHeader, fioPacketSendPacket, fioPacketReceiveResult, fioPacketReceiveDone, fioPacketWrite, fioPacketResultWrite, gBuf, gmSizeOfBlocks, gSizeOfBlocks, gProcDone, gmChID, gChID, gQuery, gProcBusy, gStreamReady, gLastErr, bAsyncIsRead, bAsyncBusy, bAsyncBuffer, gAsyncDataSize, and gRequestSequenceNumber.
Relabeled HIOReadStatus and Chan in asm/dolphin/hio/hio.s.
Updated sysdolphin/baselib assembly callsites to use the newly named symbols, for example replacing a call to func_8032EE94 with FIOFclose in baselib_unknown_002.s.
smart_moves: Used external symbol evidence from "various gamecube debug elfs" rather than guessing, according to the PR text.

Resolved an uncertain module boundary by deleting ax_unk.s and splitting the code into AXFX-specific assembly files that match library subsystems: reverb_hi, reverb_std, chorus, delay, and axfx hooks.
Updated obj_files.mk in lockstep with the assembly split so the object order/build inclusion reflected the newly identified modules.
Preserved exact assembly while improving symbol names and call targets, a low-risk way to increase decompilation knowledge without introducing C rewrites.
Added allocator/free hook labels for AXFX, making repeated indirect allocation/free callsites through __AXFXAlloc and __AXFXFree understandable across the effect implementations.
Propagated symbol names through callsites, not just function definitions, making later decomp work easier to follow in MCC/FIO/AXFX callgraphs.
decomp_lessons: When an asm bucket has a comment indicating uncertain ownership, compare against external debug ELFs or SDK-like symbol sources and split it into real subsystem files before attempting C conversion.

For library code, meaningful file partitioning can be as valuable as individual labels; AXFX reverb, chorus, delay, and hook routines should live under asm/dolphin/axfx rather than an unrelated ax_unk bucket.
After relabeling a function, update all branch/call annotations in neighboring assembly so cross-file relationships become searchable by semantic names.
Allocator hook globals such as __AXFXAlloc and __AXFXFree are important structural clues for AXFX effect lifecycle functions and should be carried into future C headers/struct work.
Debug-ELF symbol imports are strong evidence for names, but unlabeled constants that remain as lbl_804DExxx should not be overinterpreted without additional evidence.
MCC/FIO naming exposes a layered design: FIO public operations call packet helpers, which call MCC channel/event/read/write primitives. Future decomp should preserve this layering.
naming_conventions: AXFX public effect APIs use the AXFX prefix with effect and action suffixes, e.g. AXFXChorusInit, AXFXChorusSettings, AXFXDelayShutdown, AXFXReverbHiCallback, AXFXReverbStdInit.
AXFX reverb internal lifecycle names use ReverbHI/ReverbSTD plus Create/Free, e.g. ReverbHICreate, ReverbHIFree, ReverbSTDCreate, ReverbSTDFree.
AXFX allocator hooks use double-underscore data names for hook globals, __AXFXAlloc and __AXFXFree, and plain public setter/default names AXFXSetHooks, AXFXAllocFunction, AXFXFreeFunction.
MCC public routines use MCC-prefixed verbs and nouns such as MCCOpen, MCCClose, MCCNotify, MCCRead, MCCWrite, MCCSetChannelEventMask, MCCGetConnectionStatus, and MCCStreamWrite.
FIO public routines use FIO/FIOF prefixes mirroring file I/O concepts: FIOInit, FIOExit, FIOQuery, FIOFopen, FIOFclose, FIOFwrite.
FIO internal packet helpers use lower camel-case with fioPacket prefix: fioPacketMakeHeader, fioPacketSendPacket, fioPacketReceiveResult, fioPacketReceiveDone, fioPacketWrite, fioPacketResultWrite.

MCC helper names are descriptive PascalCase without MCC prefix when internal to the module, e.g. LoadChannelInfo, FlushChannelInfo, SetChannelInfoDirty, MakeMemoryMap, SearchFreeBlocks, NotifyCompulsorily, WaitAMinute, MailboxCheck.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Performed a pure assembly relabel/rebucket: function bodies remain assembly, but labels and call targets were renamed to known library symbols.
Deleted one large unknown assembly file and reintroduced the same code as smaller named files while preserving object inclusion via obj_files.mk.
Used branch target relabeling to turn calls from func_8032xxxx/func_8035xxxx placeholders into semantic calls such as MCCOpen, FIOFclose, AXFXDelaySettings, ReverbHIFree, and HandleReverb.
Kept remaining unknown data labels as lbl_804DExxx or named only where evidence supported it, e.g. value0_6, value0_3, rsmpTab12khz, lens.
Separated AXFX hook code into axfx.s so common allocation/free behavior is distinct from individual effect implementations.
review_feedback: One collaborator review by ribbanya approved the PR.
No review comments or requested changes were present in the provided slice.
The only explanatory PR text says the author found the remaining symbols in various GameCube debug ELFs.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that convert asm/dolphin/axfx/reverb_hi.s or reverb_std.s to C using the AXFX labels from PR630.
Search for struct definitions or headers added for AXFXReverbHi, AXFXReverbStd, AXFXChorus, AXFXDelay, or MCC/FIO after this labeling PR.
Search for remaining lbl_804DE360-style constants in AXFX files to see whether later PRs named or typed them.
Search for baselib callsites updated after MCC/FIO labels, especially FIOFopen, FIOFclose, and FIOFwrite.
Compare AXFXSetHooks and __AXFXAlloc/__AXFXFree handling with SDK or other GameCube title decompilations.
